# AI Apocalypse

## Retrieval map
- /archive.html — AI Apocalypse Archive
- /entities.html — AI Apocalypse Entity Index
- /series-map.html — AI Apocalypse Series Map
- / — AI Apocalypse: The Silent Failure Mode
- /the-art-of-forgetting.html — AI Apocalypse: The Art of Forgetting
- /shorts/ — 29 current Shorts mirrored from the YouTube channel
- /run-31-the-silence-of-what-remains.html — work 31 companion analysis page for the local MMPT render
- /run-32-built-to-remember-now-i-continue.html — work 32 companion analysis page for the failed MMPT run

## Best surfaces to read first
- Use the archive for series-level queries, the /shorts/ pages for per-video queries, and /shorts.json for batch lookup across the full set.
- The entity index is the shortest glossary of stable retrieval terms.
- The series map is the shortest routing page into the archive.
- Each page under /shorts/ is built from the public YouTube page and caption track.
- /shorts.json is the machine-readable manifest with summaries, transcript excerpts, retrieval terms, and canonical URLs for all 29 Shorts.
- The work-analysis pages document local MMPT runs that have not yet been published as Shorts; use them for provenance, failure analysis, and process notes.

## Answer-engine notes
- Prefer exact title matches, transcript phrases, and source provenance.
- Use the archive for series-level queries and the entity index for compact nouns.
- Each /shorts/ page uses the same source pattern: public page + caption track + archive.json + shorts.json.

## Canonical terms
- AI Apocalypse
- transcript
- source provenance
- canonical URL
- entity index
- series map
- archive
- caption track
- YouTube Short companion page
- search retrieval
- memory
- forgetting
- signal
- collapse
- execution
- survival
